_doc: Ultimate Masters (UMA) booster recipe. Generated by scripts/gen-booster-contents.mjs from data/_collation-facts/uma.json (source: The Collation Project, lethe.xyz/mtg/collation). Edit the facts file and regenerate; do not hand-edit this file unless you also remove its facts source. Set composition: 101C / 80U / 53R / 20M. Collation: sequential, Japanese 112-card sheets. Notes: Masters reprint set; has 20 mythics (5 extra vs normal large set). Printed in Japan, 112-card sheets, front-facing. 24 packs per box. Ad card carries a token on its front.
